should_trigger.query: Create a new skill for PDF processing
should_trigger.rationale: Direct request to create a skill

should_trigger.query: I need to package my skill for distribution
should_trigger.rationale: Skill packaging is part of skill creation workflow
Skill testing/evaluation is part of skill creation
Description optimization is part of skill creation

should_trigger.query: I want to improve my existing skill
should_trigger.rationale: Skill improvement is part of skill creation workflow
Benchmarking is part of skill evaluation

should_trigger.query: How do I create a skill?
Turn this workflow into a skill

should_not_trigger.query: Use my pdf-rotator skill to rotate this file
should_not_trigger.rationale: Using an existing skill, not creating one
Informational question about skills, not creation
Deleting a skill, not creating or improving one
Writing documentation, not creating a skill
